name: Groq
description: Run LLM inference at very high speed using Groq's purpose-built LPU hardware. Fully compatible with the OpenAI API format — swap in models like Llama 3, Mixtral, and Gemma.

auth.hint: Create a free API key at console.groq.com. Groq offers a generous free tier.

tools.name: chat_completion
tools.description: Send messages to a Groq-hosted model and get an AI response. Supports system prompts and conversation history.

params.name: model
params.description: Model ID, e.g. llama-3.3-70b-versatile, llama-3.1-8b-instant, or gemma2-9b-it

tools.name: list_models
tools.description: List all AI models available on Groq with their IDs and context window sizes.

tools.name: create_transcription
tools.description: Transcribe an audio file to text using Groq's Whisper integration (fastest Whisper in the world).

params.name: language
params.description: Language code, e.g. en, pt, es. Omit for auto-detection

params.name: response_format
params.description: Output format: json, text, or verbose_json
